prediction_storage.notes: SOMOS scores are MOS-style naturalness ratings. Preserve raw model outputs and parsed numeric scores before any calibration.

mos_1_5.prompt_template:
Rate the naturalness and overall quality of this synthesized speech on a 1-5 MOS scale.

Use this scale:
1 = very unnatural or very poor quality.
2 = poor quality.
3 = fair quality.
4 = good quality.
5 = completely natural or excellent quality.

Return only a single number from 1 to 5. Decimals are allowed.
mos_1_5.description: One model call per audio sample asking for a SOMOS-style 1-5 MOS naturalness score.

quality_1_10_no_rubric.prompt_template: You are a trained assessor of speech quality. We are assessing the quality and naturalness of synthesized speech. Rate the quality and naturalness of this speech on a scale of 1-10. Do not give a rubric. Return only a single number from 1 to 10. Decimals are allowed.
quality_1_10_no_rubric.description: One model call per audio sample asking for a direct 1-10 speech quality and naturalness score without an explicit rubric.
